parameters.query:
SELECT id::text, name, source_type, url, language, query_template, requests_per_hour
FROM wcic.news_sources
WHERE is_active = true
ORDER BY priority DESC;

WITH team_ids AS (
  SELECT id FROM wcic.teams
  WHERE name = ANY($7::text[])
)
INSERT INTO wcic.news_analysis (
  news_id, summary, impact_score, impact_type, sentiment,
  key_insight, tags, topics, affected_team_ids, affected_player_ids,
  raw_gpt_response, ai_model, prompt_version, tokens_used, processing_ms
) VALUES (
  $1::uuid, $2, $3::numeric, $4::wcic.impact_type, $5::wcic.sentiment_label,
  $6, $8, $9,
  ARRAY(SELECT id FROM team_ids)::uuid[],
  '{}'::uuid[],
  $10::jsonb, $11, $12, $13::integer, $14::integer
)
ON CONFLICT (news_id) DO UPDATE SET
  summary         = EXCLUDED.summary,
  impact_score    = EXCLUDED.impact_score,
  impact_type     = EXCLUDED.impact_type,
  sentiment       = EXCLUDED.sentiment,
  key_insight     = EXCLUDED.key_insight,
  tags            = EXCLUDED.tags,
  topics          = EXCLUDED.topics,
  raw_gpt_response = EXCLUDED.raw_gpt_response,
  tokens_used     = EXCLUDED.tokens_used,
  processing_ms   = EXCLUDED.processing_ms
RETURNING id::text, news_id::text, impact_score;
UPDATE wcic.news SET processing_status = $2::wcic.processing_status WHERE id = $1::uuid;

import json; d=json.load(open('/home/claude/wcic/n8n/workflows/WF-03-news-intelligence.json')); print(f'WF-03: {len(d["nodes"])} nodes, {len(d["connections"])} connections - JSON válido')
